message:
gt hook: add git fetch for divergence check and recent trail summary

Enhances the `gt hook` status output with two improvements:

1. Git divergence warning now fetches from origin before checking,
   so the ahead/behind counts are fresh rather than stale. Falls back
   to origin/main when the feature branch has no remote tracking branch.

2. New recent trail summary shows a compact 24h activity summary
   (commit count by author) so workers see what happened while away.

Closes: gt-7w6cq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
